entry.title: Lissy93 opened an issue in VERT
entry.content:
Lissy93 opened an issue in VERT-sh/VERT · March 15, 2026 16:01
Question: Is sending user data/IP to ipinfo still needed? #240
Thank you for VERT! It works perfectly, nicely build and is really useful 😍 I do just have one question / issue, with how the server-detection work…
